import cmath

def dft(x):
    N = len(x)
    X = [0] * N
    for k in range(N):
        sum_val = 0
        for n in range(N):
            angle = -2 * cmath.pi * k * n / N
            sum_val += x[n] * cmath.exp(angle * 1j)
        X[k] = sum_val
    return X

def fft(x):
    N = len(x)

    if N <= 1:
        return x

    if N % 2 != 0:
        raise ValueError("FFT algorithm requires input size to be a power of 2 for this basic implementation.")

    even = fft(x[0::2])
    odd = fft(x[1::2])

    X = [0] * N
    for k in range(N // 2):
        twiddle = cmath.exp(-2 * cmath.pi * k / N * 1j)
        X[k] = even[k] + twiddle * odd[k]
        X[k + N // 2] = even[k] - twiddle * odd[k]
    return X
